# Version 4.151.0 (Unreleased)
> **m151 fixes and performance ports**

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0-unreleased merges upstream Skia m151 bug fixes and ports two colour-conversion hot paths to managed code. SKColor-to-SKColorF conversion and SKPMColor premultiply/unpremultiply now run entirely in managed integer math, eliminating P/Invoke round-trips. The WASM target gains an exception-handling regression test and the emsdk 5.0.6 exnref libraries.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Upstream Skia m151 bug fixes merged** — Syncs the latest upstream chrome/m151 bug fixes into the bundled Skia renderer. ([#4489](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4489))
- **CPU raster regression corrected** — Restores SK_ENABLE_LEGACY_SHADERCONTEXT so CPU-rasterised surfaces produce correct output after the m151 sync. ([#4428](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4428))

## Bug Fixes

- **SKColor-to-SKColorF conversion ported to managed math** — The hot-path SKColor → SKColorF conversion now runs in managed C# integer arithmetic, removing a P/Invoke round-trip on every call. ([#4370](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4370))
- **SKPMColor premultiply/unpremultiply ported to managed math** — Single-value premultiply and unpremultiply operations now use managed integer math instead of native calls, reducing interop overhead. ([#4385](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4385))

## Platform

- **Emscripten 5.0.6 exnref libraries for WASM** — Builds the emsdk 5.0.6 static libraries with new exnref exception handling, and adds a preview-.NET WASM test job to catch exception-handling regressions. ([#4487](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4487), [#4488](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4488))
